case_title: COLEMAN, FRED VS CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER INC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,800.00 FILED BY COLEMAN, FRED AS TO DEFENDANT CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-27-2003 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF COLEMAN, FRED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHINATOWN COMMUNITY DEVELOPMENT CENTER INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
